title: Mysterious Orb roll-six route applies Hit and Atk bonus

card.rawText: At the beginning of your turn roll 1 die. Gain the following for 1 turn cycle: 1-2: SPD: +6. 3-4: Atk: +6. 5-6: Hit: +6.

effect.value: At the beginning of your turn roll 1 die. Gain the following for 1 turn cycle: 1-2: SPD: +6. 3-4: Atk: +6. 5-6: Hit: +6.

plan.title: Mysterious Orb roll-six route applies Hit and Atk bonus
plan.summary: Force the high roll-table branch and verify Mysterious Orb applies the +6 combat stat bonus for the turn cycle.

notes: Read text first: at beginning of your turn roll 1 die; 5-6 gives Hit +6 for 1 turn cycle. Runtime currently also exposes a +6 combat route in battle output.

expectedAssertions.label: Mysterious Orb high branch raises damage to 7
Battle log includes Mysterious Orb +6 Atk bonus

manualVerification: Confirm the 1-2 SPD and 3-4 Atk branches get separate coverage later.
riskNotes: This fixture covers the forced 5-6/high branch only.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Force the high roll-table branch and verify Mysterious Orb applies the +6 combat stat bonus for the turn cycle.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
